sentences.arabic: أَرَادَتْ سَلْمَى تَعَلُّمَ الطَّبْخِ مِنْ جَدَّتِهَا.
sentences.translation: Selma je htjela naučiti kuhati od svoje bake.
sentences.translationEn: Salma wanted to learn cooking from her grandmother.

sentences.arabic: أَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍ أَحْرَقَتِ الأَكْلَ وَضَحِكَتِ الْجَدَّةُ بِرِفْقٍ.
sentences.translation: Prvi put je zagorjela hranu i baka se nježno nasmijala.
sentences.translationEn: The first time she burned the food and the grandmother laughed gently.

sentences.translation: Baka je rekla: «Svaki kuhar je počeo ovako».
sentences.translationEn: The grandmother said: «Every cook started like this».

sentences.arabic: تَدَرَّبَتْ سَلْمَى أُسْبُوعًا كَامِلًا وَطَبَخَتْ شُورْبَةً لَذِيذَةً.
sentences.translation: Selma je vježbala cijelu sedmicu i skuhala je ukusnu supu.
sentences.translationEn: Salma practiced for a full week and cooked a delicious soup.
